column1: 内容をよく確認した上で、署名してください。

column4: 上で (after doing / upon doing / based on)
column5: Verb[た] + 上で (after doing, then proceed) / Noun + の + 上で (in the realm of / based on)
column6: V[た]+上で = after completing V, then do something else (sequential); N+の上で = in terms of N, from the basis of N
column8: V[た]上で = sequential (after V then); てから = after (general sequential); において = in (formal domain); 上 alone = above/up
